content: No, poverty is not an inevitable part of every social structure. Many social structures, such as those in Scandinavian countries, have implemented policies and systems that effectively reduce poverty rates. Effective social welfare programs, progressive taxation, and strong social safety nets can help mitigate poverty.
raw_content: No, poverty is not an inevitable part of every social structure. Many social structures, such as those in Scandinavian countries, have implemented policies and systems that effectively reduce poverty rates. Effective social welfare programs, progressive taxation, and strong social safety nets can help mitigate poverty.
